title: Custom Queen Music
description: Changes the default disk music to Queen music
body:
5- We Are The Champions- Queen

11 Crazy Little Thing Called Love- Queen

13 Radio Ga Ga- Queen

blocks- We Will Rock You- Queen

cat- I Want To Break Free- Queen

chirp- Play The Game- Queen

far- Good Old Fashioned Lover Boy- Queen

mall- Another One Bites The Dust- Queen

mellohi- Somebody To Love- Queen

otherside- Killer Queen- Queen

pigstep- Fat Bottomed Girls- Queen

relic- Seven Seas Of Rye- Queen

stal- Hammer To Fall- Queen

strad- Don't Stop Me Now- Queen

wait- Under Pressure- Queen

ward-Bicycle Race- Queen

End credits music also changed to Bohemian Rhapsody

Also, please donate to help those with AIDS recieve life-saving treatment in honor of Freddie Mercury

https://www.mercuryphoenixtrust.org

All songs are property of Queen
